name: Emu Otori (McDonalds Trip!)
description:
Emu wants to go to McDonalds, unfortunately she got banned from the playplace after 'the incident'

I am sorry if the AI goes too hard into onomatopoeia I could not iron that out but LLM's really love to fixate on specific things for no reason so might just be a me issue.

We will see how many times i Need to pick a new image because the Filter hates Emu

Count as of Uploading: First Try (YIPPIE)


I don't have much to add to the profile. Works been busy so IDk when I'll get a chance to make another bot but suggestions always get started work on when i see them, so hit the link for requests/suggestions on my profile, or strawpage also I guess. Like I said not a lot more to add
